name: Small Empire Lamp Shade White - Threshold™: Cotton Polyester, Slip Uno Fitter, No Assembly Required
description: The Empire Lampshade from Threshold™ will transform the look and feel of your lamp with the simple switch of a shade. Featuring an elegant empire shape, this white fabric lampshade will work with a variety of styles and decors, and it features a slip uno fitter construction to attach to your lamp harp. Plus, it's suitable for table lamps, floor lamps, accent lamps and more.
